fields.description:
## Why
Audit OSS finding #2 (MEDIUM). The GitHub mirror has no CodeQL / SAST workflow. Security scanning today is gitleaks-driven secret detection on the Gerrit review path plus a gating pip-audit â€” good, but no static code analysis. CodeQL is free for public repos and runs fine on the read-only mirror (push/schedule triggers, writes results to the Security tab, does not touch the tree), adding an independent detection layer.

## What / files
Add `.github/workflows/codeql.yml`:
- `languages` matrix: `python` and `javascript` (the CodeQL `javascript` key already covers TypeScript; do NOT use `javascript-typescript`, which is not the Actions matrix key).
- Triggers: `push` to `main` + a weekly `schedule` cron.
- Least-privilege `permissions`: `security-events: write`, `contents: read`, `actions: read`.
- `concurrency` with `cancel-in-progress: true`.
- Pin actions by MAJOR VERSION TAG to match repo convention (test.yml/gerrit-verify use `actions/checkout@v5`, `actions/setup-python@v6`); use `github/codeql-action/init@v3` / `analyze@v3`. No SHA-pinning (no other workflow here uses it).
- Alerts route to the default Security tab.

## Scope
In: `.github/workflows/codeql.yml` (new file only). Out: changing other workflows' pinning; alert routing beyond the Security tab; the first-run finding triage (see below).

## Post-landing note (not a pre-close blocker)
CodeQL's first scan only runs on the GitHub mirror AFTER this change lands on main, so first-run results cannot exist while the ticket is open in the worktree. First-run triage is therefore a tracked post-landing follow-up recorded as a comment on this ticket â€” it is explicitly NOT a precondition for closing this ticket.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `.github/workflows/codeql.yml` exists and parses as valid YAML (python -c yaml.safe_load / actionlint clean), with a `languages` matrix of exactly `python` and `javascript`
- [ ] `permissions` is least-privilege (security-events: write, contents: read, actions: read); a weekly `schedule` trigger exists in addition to `push` on main; `concurrency.cancel-in-progress: true` is set
- [ ] All actions are pinned by version tag (`@vN`) consistent with the other workflows (grep-verifiable: no bare `@main`/@sha in the new file)
- [ ] (post-landing, tracked) after the stack lands, a comment records the first CodeQL run's finding count and its triage disposition
